tool.name: asn_lookup
tool.description: Lookup ASN and IP range information for network reconnaissance.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Map IP addresses to their autonomous systems - Get details about an ASN (organization, contacts, allocation) - Enumerate IP prefixes announced by an ASN - Find related IP ranges for an organization - Network infrastructure reconnaissance

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The lookup action to perform: - lookup_ip: Get ASN info for an IP address - lookup_asn: Get details for an ASN number - prefixes: Get IP prefixes announced by an ASN

parameter.name: ip_address
parameter.description: IP address to lookup (for lookup_ip action)

parameter.name: asn
parameter.description: ASN number to lookup (for lookup_asn, prefixes actions). E.g., "AS15169"

parameter.name: domain
parameter.description: Domain to resolve and lookup (alternative to ip_address)

returns.description: ASN information, IP ranges, and network details including organization, country, and contact information

tool.examples:
# Lookup ASN info for an IP address
lookup_ip 8.8.8.8
# Get details for an ASN
lookup_asn AS15169
# Get IP prefixes for an ASN
prefixes AS15169
# Lookup by domain name
lookup_ip google.com
